What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Light wooden floorboards cover the room where a dark wooden cabinet stands on the right and a white radiator mounts on the left. A man wearing a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt, and blue jeans enters the space. He positions himself in the center between the cabinet and radiator, placing his right hand on his hip before performing dance steps.

canonical_answer: At 0s, text reading 'Ireland forever' appears on a green background; at 4s, dance details including '32T, 2 murs' are displayed; at 10s, the scene transitions to an empty room with wooden floors; at 12s, a person in a grey shirt walks across the room; at 14s, a man wearing a cowboy hat enters and stands in the center.
